samples.current_message: Now there are sentinels at the beginning of each chat and when a timer for inactivity runs out the conversation collapses, a summary is generated, the messages are removed from the context window, memories are extracted. On the next load three of those session summaries are loaded into the context window with your existing session begin/end marker.
